sections.paragraph:
διΐστημι [διά, ἵστημι; ‘set apart, separate’: the basic idea is an interval or distance between two points]

—1. ‘make a spatial separation’, tr. of distance covered go on Ac 27:28.

—2. ‘move away from’, intr. of pers. take leave, part Lk 24:51.

—3. ‘intervene between events’, of time, intr. pass Lk 22:59.
